scripts.q1: npx playwright test tests/Q1.spec.js --headed && npx playwright show-report

scripts.q3: npx playwright test tests/Q3.spec.js --headed && npx playwright show-report
scripts.all: npx playwright test tests/Q1.spec.js tests/Q2.spec.js tests/Q3.spec.js --headed && npx playwright show-report
